activities: Crew configured spacewalking tools and reviewed EVA procedures ahead of the June 30 excursion to replace a malfunctioning wrist joint on the Canadarm2 robotic arm.
NASA confirmed Christopher Williams and Jessica Meir as the spacewalking pair for the Canadarm2 wrist joint repair.
Crew grew cartilage tissue samples in microgravity to study joint-disease treatments and ran advanced materials manufacturing sessions.
SpaceX's uncrewed Cargo Dragon undocked from the Harmony module and departed the station after completing its resupply mission.
